title: Add collaboration features
original_text: Implemented real-time collaboration features. Added real-time document editing with operational transformation. Implemented presence indicators for collaborators. Added comment threads and mentions. Implemented document version history. Added sharing and permission management. Implemented activity feed and notifications. Result: collaboration features working.
expected_body_lines: - Add real-time document editing with OT
expected_command: git commit -m "feat(collab): add real-time collaboration features"
